span.p: Key Components: AppContext, DiffProcessor, CompDiffProcessor, Loader

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p: Key Components: DiffCalculator, SchemaValidator, RequirementsProvider, FunctionProvider, ResourceManager, DiffRenderer, CompDiffRenderer, Render Function
